description_long: This coupe car features a low-slung, aerodynamic body with a prominent rear wing and aggressive front fascia, suggesting a high-performance sports design. The exterior is covered in a striking patterned livery with a mix of red, black, and white hues, giving it a unique and eye-catching appearance. Large, angular headlights and wide air intakes dominate the front, while the rear showcases a diffuser and dual exhausts, emphasizing its sporty intent. The side profile reveals sculpted doors, pronounced wheel arches, and sleek side mirrors, all contributing to its streamlined silhouette. The windows are tinted and the roofline flows smoothly into the rear wing, characteristic of a fastback coupe. Visible alloy wheels and low ground clearance further reinforce its performance-oriented nature.
description: A low, aerodynamic coupe car with a bold patterned exterior, large rear wing, and aggressive sports styling. Its sculpted body, tinted windows, and prominent wheels highlight its high-performance design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, aggressive grille, angular headlights, and the patterned hood with a visible rear wing.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sleek profile, sculpted doors, large wheels, and the prominent rear wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the diffuser, dual exhausts, taillights, and the full span of the rear wing.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the streamlined body, tinted windows, and detailed wheel design.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
